provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Declaration of Aerodromes Notice

Each of the following areas is hereby declared to be an aerodrome for the purposes of the Aerodromes (Licensing and Control) Act 1 : 1 Cap. 92 (a) all that area of land in the Kisarawe District shown edged in red on Registered Plan No. A.V. 85A deposited in the office of the Commissioner for Surveys; (b) all that area of land in the Tanga District shown edged in yellow on Registered Plan No. A.V. 87A deposited in the office of the Commissioner for Surveys; (c) all that area of land in the Mwanza District shown edged in red on Registered Plan No. A.V. 88 deposited in the office of the Commissioner for Surveys.
